data.title: Ozzy Tyres introduces MONSTA Tyre for Australia's 4x4 daily drivers, focusing on comfort and noise reduction. #InnovativeProductAU
data.description: An Australian manufacturer based in Sydney unveiled a new all-terrain tire on January 20, 2026. The tire is designed to provide a quieter and more comfortable driving experience tailored to the way Australians commonly drive. With the increasing popularity of 4x4 utility vehicles in Australia, Ozzy Tyres introduced this product to meet the demand.

data.title: PRM acquires Clean Globe Environmental, LLC to expand presence. Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: PRM, a leading environmental remediation and landfill gas services company, has increased its presence in the Northeast by acquiring Clean. This acquisition enhances PRM's capabilities in environmental contracting. The announcement was made on Jan. 20, 2026.

data.title: Idahoan Foods promotes real mashed potatoes for families with 'Get Real' campaign, embracing messy real-life moments.
data.description: For over 65 years, Idahoan Foods has been providing families nationwide with 100% authentic mashed potatoes. The company, based in Idaho Falls, is shifting away from the polished, artificial image to embrace the authenticity of everyday life. This change was announced on January 20, 2026. Idahoan Foods is renowned for its commitment to delivering genuine mashed potatoes to consumers.

data.title: Major banks predict gold price may hit $5,000, per Lear Capital report authored by Kathrynn Ward; shift towards precious metals noted.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Lear Capital, a prominent player in precious metals since 1997, has published an in-depth market analysis discussing the reasons behind prominent Wall Street banks forecasting a potential surge in gold prices to $5,000 per ounce. The report, crafted by Global Financial Research Specialist Kathrynn Ward, highlights the underlying factors fostering institutional trust in precious metals. Kevin DeMeritt, the founder of Lear Capital, remarked on the notable development, noting the significant endorsements from industry giants like JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) to release 2nd quarter 2026 results on Feb 3, 2026; conference call at 10:00 am ET. Webcast available on their website.
data.description: In Westerville, Ohio, the Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 before the market opens on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 10:00 am ET to discuss the results. The call will also be webcast live on the company's website, investors.marzetticompany.com.

data.title: CFTC Chief Selig appoints crypto lawyer as adviser; also names another adviser; letter helped achieve SEC's no-action on crypto custody.
data.description: Michael Selig has appointed two senior advisers, one of whom played a significant role in a law firm's letter that resulted in the SEC issuing a no-action letter regarding crypto custodians.

data.title: Teleste chosen to supply RGB LED displays for Belgian railway stations by INFRABEL SA, an important step in modernizing infrastructure.
data.description: In Turku, Finland, on January 20, 2026, Teleste has been chosen by INFRABEL SA to provide high-tech full-color RGB LED passenger information screens for railway stations throughout Belgium. This partnership signifies a significant advancement in enhancing...

data.title: ACEP & other health groups ask CMS for signage guidance to prevent worker violence. Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, the American College of Emergency Physicians (ACEP) along with a group of health care organizations collectively penned a letter requesting the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) to provide direction that would simplify the placement of signs in emergency facilities. The request aims to streamline communication for patients and staff, promoting efficiency and optimal care. This initiative seeks to enhance the overall hospital experience for all involved, aligning with the commitment to quality healthcare services.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig lawyers advised on two award-winning transactions in GBM Awards: Latin America & Caribbean 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, legal experts from the renowned firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP played advisory roles in two exceptional transactions at the GBM Awards: Latin America & Caribbean 2026. These deals included the Financial Institutions Syndicated Loan Deal of the Year. The firm's attorneys were instrumental in securing these accolades, showcasing their expertise in the banking and finance sector.

data.title: Watercrest SLG introduces Paulina Bawa as Memory Care Director at Fredericksburg AL & MC. Prepares for resident openings.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida on January 20, 2026, Watercrest Senior Living Group has appointed Paulina Bawa as the Memory Care Director of Watercrest Fredericksburg Assisted Living and Memory Care in Fredericksburg, Virginia. Watercrest Fredericksburg is getting ready to accommodate residents and provide specialized care under the leadership of Bawa.

data.title: RESICAP sells new home construction subsidiary ResiBuilt, focusing on SFR and BTR sectors. Transaction details undisclosed.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, RESICAP, a prominent real estate services platform specializing in single-family rentals and build-to-rent properties, disclosed the sale of its new home construction arm, ResiBuilt, to an external purchaser. The transaction signifies a strategic move by RESICAP in the industry.

data.title: Scientel Solutions releases 2025 Community Impact Report showcasing commitment to community with total $500,000 donations.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Aurora, Illinois, technology company Scientel Solutions unveiled its 2025 Community Impact Report. The report showcases the company's ongoing dedication to philanthropy and community enhancement. Based in Aurora, Illinois, Scientel Solutions' initiatives have had a significant impact, with the report illustrating their commitment to giving back and supporting the communities they operate in.

data.title: 300+ Black women leaders advocate for local and national priorities in Georgia Capitol on first day of 2026 legislative session. #ElectionYear
data.description: On January 20, 2026, over 300 influential Black women took their constituents' concerns to Georgia's State Capitol as the 2026 legislative session commenced. Their goal was to engage lawmakers and strongly advocate for their communities amidst the pivotal election climate.
